spec.description: Real-time solar production, home consumption, Tesla charging, and cost savings

spec.rawSql: SELECT time, solar_w AS "Solar (W)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

spec.title: Solar Offset Over Time
spec.description: Solar production as a percentage of total consumption over time

spec.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('${interval}', time) AS time, CASE WHEN (sum(solar_w) + sum(grid_net_w)) > 0 THEN sum(solar_w) / (sum(solar_w) + sum(grid_net_w)) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS "Solar Offset (%)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

spec.title: Energy Balance
spec.description: Solar production vs total consumption for the selected time range

spec.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, round(CAST(sum(solar_w) * 10.0 / 3600.0 / 1000.0 AS numeric), 1) AS "Produced" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
SELECT now() AS time, round(CAST(sum(house_total_w) * 10.0 / 3600.0 / 1000.0 AS numeric), 1) AS "Consumed" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

spec.title: Grid Cost (With Solar)
spec.description: Electricity cost from grid imports for the selected time range at the configured electric rate.

spec.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, round(CAST(sum(grid_net_w) * 10.0 / 3600.0 / 1000.0 * ${electric_rate} AS numeric), 2) AS "Grid Cost ($)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

spec.title: Cost Without Solar
spec.description: What your electricity cost would be without solar, based on total house consumption at the configured electric rate.

spec.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, round(CAST(sum(house_total_w) * 10.0 / 3600.0 / 1000.0 * ${electric_rate} AS numeric), 2) AS "Without Solar ($)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

spec.title: Solar Savings
spec.description: Money saved on electricity for the selected time range thanks to solar generation offsetting grid imports.

spec.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, round(CAST((sum(house_total_w) - sum(GREATEST(grid_net_w))) * 10.0 / 3600.0 / 1000.0 * ${electric_rate} AS numeric), 2) AS "Solar Savings ($)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
SELECT time, house_total_w AS "House (W)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

spec.title: Solar Offset % (excl Tesla)
spec.description: Percentage of non-Tesla consumption covered by solar production for the selected time range

spec.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, CASE WHEN (e.consumption - COALESCE(t.tesla, 0)) > 0 THEN e.solar / (e.consumption - COALESCE(t.tesla, 0)) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS "Solar Offset excl Tesla (%)" FROM (SELECT sum(solar_w) AS solar, sum(solar_w) + sum(grid_net_w) AS consumption FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)) e, (SELECT sum(charging_w) AS tesla FROM tesla_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)) t
SELECT time, charging_w AS "Charging (W)" FROM tesla_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time_bucket('${interval}', time) AS time, avg(solar_w) AS "Solar" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('${interval}', e.time) AS time, avg(e.house_total_w) - COALESCE(avg(t.charging_w), 0) AS "House (excl Tesla)" FROM enphase_readings e LEFT JOIN tesla_readings t ON time_bucket('${interval}', e.time) = time_bucket('${interval}', t.time) WHERE $__timeFilter(e.time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('${interval}', time) AS time, avg(grid_net_w) AS "Grid" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('${interval}', time) AS time, avg(charging_w) AS "Tesla" FROM tesla_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

spec.title: Net Solar vs Total Load
spec.description: Positive = exporting to grid, Negative = importing from grid

spec.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('${interval}', time) AS time, avg(solar_w) - avg(house_total_w) AS "Net Solar vs Total" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

spec.title: Net Solar vs House Only (excl Tesla)
spec.description: Positive = surplus solar after house, Negative = house deficit

spec.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('${interval}', e.time) AS time, avg(e.solar_w) - (avg(e.house_total_w) - COALESCE(avg(t.charging_w), 0)) AS "Net Solar vs House Only" FROM enphase_readings e LEFT JOIN tesla_readings t ON time_bucket('${interval}', e.time) = time_bucket('${interval}', t.time) WHERE $__timeFilter(e.time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 day', time AT TIME ZONE '${timezone}') AT TIME ZONE '${timezone}' AS time, (sum(solar_w) * 10.0 / 3600.0) * ${electric_rate} / 1000.0 AS "Solar Savings ($)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH daily_charging AS ( SELECT time_bucket('1 day', time AT TIME ZONE '${timezone}') AT TIME ZONE '${timezone}' AS day, sum(charging_w) * 10.0 / 3600.0 / 1000.0 AS kwh FROM tesla_readings WHERE is_charging = TRUE AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ), daily_gas AS ( SELECT dc.day, dc.kwh, COALESCE( (SELECT g.price_per_gallon FROM gas_prices g WHERE g.period <= dc.day::date ORDER BY g.period DESC LIMIT 1), ${gas_price} ) AS gp FROM daily_charging dc ) SELECT day AS "Day", round(CAST(kwh AS numeric), 2) AS "kWh Charged", round(CAST(kwh * ${tesla_efficiency} AS numeric), 1) AS "Miles Equivalent", round(CAST(gp AS numeric), 2) AS "Gas Price ($/gal)", round(CAST((kwh * ${tesla_efficiency} / ${ice_mpg}) * gp AS numeric), 2) AS "Gas Cost ($)", round(CAST(kwh * ${electric_rate} AS numeric), 2) AS "Electric Cost ($)", round(CAST((kwh * ${tesla_efficiency} / ${ice_mpg}) * gp - kwh * ${electric_rate} AS numeric), 2) AS "Net Savings ($)" FROM daily_gas ORDER BY day DESC

spec.title: Solar Offset %
spec.description: Percentage of total consumption covered by solar production for the selected time range

spec.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, CASE WHEN (sum(solar_w) + sum(grid_net_w)) > 0 THEN sum(solar_w) / (sum(solar_w) + sum(grid_net_w)) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS "Solar Offset (%)" FROM enphase_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

spec.title: Solar Energy Monitor

spec.name: gas_price
spec.label: Gas Price ($/gal)

spec.__legacyStringValue: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT price_per_gallon::text FROM gas_prices ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 1), '4.00')

spec.definition: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT price_per_gallon::text FROM gas_prices ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 1), '4.00')

spec.name: timezone
spec.label: Timezone
spec.description: IANA timezone name for daily bucketing (e.g. America/Chicago, America/New_York, America/Los_Angeles)
